nodes.name: .dockerignore
nodes.summary: Docker build context exclusion rules for the tag-queue cron service, keeping the image build lean by omitting unnecessary files.

nodes.name: Dockerfile
nodes.summary: Minimal alpine:3.23-based Docker image that installs curl and ca-certificates, copies the shared cron-runner.sh script, and invokes it with the PROCESS_TAG_QUEUE environment variable as the Supabase edge function trigger.
nodes.languageNotes: Single-stage Dockerfile with no build dependencies — the alpine base plus curl is sufficient for HTTP-based edge function invocation.
